nasb.text: Behold, you have heard what the kings of Assyria have done to all the lands, destroying them completely. So will you be spared?

esv.text: Behold, you have heard what the kings of Assyria have done to all lands, devoting them to destruction. And shall you be delivered?

cnv.text: 你必定聽過亞述列王向列國所行的，就是把她們完全毀滅，難道你還有救嗎？

ccb.text: 你肯定听过亚述诸王扫灭列国的事，难道你能幸免吗？

csbs.text: 看哪！你必定听说过亚述列王向各国所行的，就是把它们灭绝净尽；难道只有你能得解救吗？
